title: James Roscoe, Deputy British Ambassador to the U.S., Leaves Job Abruptly
summary_full: James Roscoe, a diplomat who previously worked for the royal family and at the United Nations, left his role without an immediate explanation.
summary_public: James Roscoe, a diplomat who previously worked for the royal family and at the United Nations, left his role without an immediate explanation.
